primary_sources.name: KDIGO Clinical Practice Guideline for Hemodialysis Adequacy
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive guidance on dialysis prescription, adequacy monitoring, and Kt/V targets

primary_sources.name: KDIGO Clinical Practice Guideline for Peritoneal Dialysis
primary_sources.relevance: Evidence-based recommendations for PD catheter placement, prescription, and complications management

primary_sources.name: NKF KDOQI Clinical Practice Guidelines for Vascular Access
primary_sources.relevance: Authoritative guidance on fistula creation, graft management, and catheter use for hemodialysis

primary_sources.name: CMS ESRD Conditions for Coverage
primary_sources.relevance: Federal requirements for dialysis facility operations, patient care standards, and quality measures

secondary_sources.name: American Journal of Kidney Diseases - Dialysis Modality Selection Review
secondary_sources.relevance: Recent evidence on shared decision-making and patient education for dialysis modality choice

gaps: Limited recent guidelines specifically addressing intradialytic complication management protocols
Emerging evidence on home hemodialysis prescription optimization not yet incorporated into major guidelines
